rag_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line when AGREE reports 'named thing must be an expression with a type'.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex; otherwise remove the guarantee.

Move only valid implementation bindings to the implementation annex or delete the invalid guarantee when diagnostics point to implementation-level references or subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` to declare equations.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
